title: Route FocusSuggestionRules.reason() multi-fragment copy through localization
summary: Moved FocusSuggestionRules reason copy out of Core/Domain. Introduced semantic FocusSuggestionRules.Reason struct (Completion + Timing enums + ReadinessContext). Domain emits semantic values; Features/Today formats them into localized display copy using 12 new keys.
translation_quality_notes: LLM-drafted by claude-opus-4-7. Predicted-time formatting uses Date.FormatStyle for locale-aware time strings. Status: needs-layout-check across all 19 locales.
residual_risk: Translations remain LLM-drafted (status: needs-layout-check). Native review still queued under app-localization-native-review-intake.
Per-locale review return files are now 33 entries stale per locale (21 prior + 12 new). Run python3 Tools/localization-return-files-refresh.py --apply when next syncing.
Adding a new Completion or Timing case without matching localized keys would not fail build — lookup would silently fall back to raw key string.
Predicted-time format uses Date.FormatStyle which produces locale-default time (e.g., "7:00 PM" vs "19:00"). Layout review needed for very long locales (ar/de/ru).
